chunks.title: The Floating Axe Head
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit describing the sons of prophets cutting wood and Elisha restoring a lost axe head.

chunks.title: Elisha's Capture and Release of Arameans
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative covering the Aramean siege of Dothan, Elisha's vision of chariots, the blinding of the army, and their release in Samaria.

chunks.title: The Siege of Samaria and Elisha's Oracle
chunks.reason: A complete narrative arc detailing the famine during the siege, the woman's complaint to the king, the king's curse on Elisha, and Elisha's final prophecy.
